gist.headline: Daily Paper Delivered
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest community apps and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the repository README to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Repository visitors will see the most up-to-date community contributions and project announcements.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot acting as a paperboy, delivering a fresh newspaper to Polly the bee in front of a community bulletin board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head handing a tiny pixelated newspaper to the cute bee mascot. They are standing in front of a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
